content.en:
On the 486th staircase.

His Royal Highness Tianxuan trembled all over, cold sweat broke out, and his eyes gradually became a little blurry, making it difficult to concentrate.

At this moment, he was suffering from an unimaginable impact of will, with his will, he was a little unbearable, he wanted to take a step and enter the 487th step, but this step was like a moat, as if there were hundreds of millions of mountains pressing on his right foot.

"Get up to me!"

His Royal Highness Tianxuan gritted his teeth and slammed into the 487th step, but as soon as he stepped into this step, a stronger will rushed over.

At this moment, His Royal Highness Tianxuan couldn't resist, and the whole person flew out upside down.

Yamashita.

A group of god-level people looked at His Highness Tianxuan who fell from the mountain, and they all sighed.

"His Highness Tianxuan stopped at the 487th step, it's a pity. "

"His Royal Highness Wanfa is now at the 625th step, I thought that His Highness Tianxuan would be able to step into 500 steps even if he was not as good as His Highness Wanfa, but I didn't expect that he couldn't bear it with only 487 steps!"

"It's not that His Highness Tianxuan's will is weak, it's that His Highness Wanfa's will is too terrifying!"

"If it was in the previous era, His Royal Highness Tianxuan would definitely crown an era, but unfortunately when he met His Highness Wanfa, he could only be reduced to a foil!"

"Shhh "

......

His Royal Highness Tianxuan stopped at the 487th step, while His Royal Highness the Blood Wind of the Demon Clan stopped at the 475th step, which was slightly weaker than His Highness Tianxuan, but compared to other Highnesses, it could be regarded as a crushing achievement.

Yamashita.

His Royal Highness Tianxuan came back to his senses from the impact of his will and looked at Ye Tian, who was on the 625th step.

At this moment, he was very calm and not too jealous.

If only one door was crushed, he might be jealous of Ye Tian, and even resentful, but after being crushed again and again, he had to admit that the gap between himself and Ye Tian was too big.

In terms of talent and strength, he is not as good as Ye Tian, but His Royal Highness Tianxuan still has the idea of catching up with Ye Tian in his heart.

"I am in the Protoss, the true heritage of our Protoss is unimaginable to the Human Race, even if I can't surpass His Highness the Ten Thousand Laws at the True God level and the Great God level, but under the cultivation of the Protoss, I still have hope to surpass His Highness the Ten Thousand Laws in the future. "

His Royal Highness Tianxuan thought to himself.

on the steps.

Ye Tian walked step by step, although it was difficult, he was still able to continue walking without falling.

The 650th step!

The 660th step!

The 670th step!

......

When Ye Tian stepped into the 690 steps, he was almost at the limit, every step he walked was very difficult, and under the impact of his will, even the immortal soul was affected.

In desperation, Ye Tian turned on the enhanced soul talent, which barely made his consciousness clear and not be defeated.

At this time, more and more people left here to receive the reward, but there were still some people waiting, wanting to see if Ye Tian could reach the 700th step.

As for the higher steps, they didn't think that Ye Tian would be able to go on.

From Ye Tian's expression and movements, they could all see that Ye Tian had also reached the limit and could no longer continue to go to a higher step.

Obviously, about 700 steps is Ye Tian's limit!

698 stone steps!

699 stone steps!

Looking at the 700th stone steps, Ye Tian's eyes were confused, under the impact of will, ninety-nine percent of his will was resisting, and the whole person would collapse at any time.

But with a strong will, he took the last step and stepped onto the 700th stone staircase.

And the moment he stepped into the 700th stone step, he was crushed by the impact of will, and the whole person fell from the mountain.

But no matter what, Ye Tian still stepped into the level of the 700th stone step.

Yamashita.

Ye Tianliang regained his will after a long time and rested for a while.

Seeing that everyone else had basically left, and only a small number of god-level people were still passing through the third round of assessment, he was also ready to leave the third round of assessment to accept the rewards that belonged to the third round of assessment.

Wow!

As soon as Ye Tian shouted to leave, the machine spirit moved Ye Tian to a large hall, which was no different from the previous hall.

"Pick a reward!"

The voice of the machine spirit came, but the main body did not appear.

Among the many rewards, Ye Tian chose a reward at random.

Wow!

The light cluster dissipated, and a gray mass appeared.

"Space Origin!"

Ye Tian was slightly surprised, this gray substance actually contained the aura of spatial origin, and it was very advanced, as a god-level spatial talent, he naturally would not admit his mistake.

Swish!

A message came into his mind from the gray mass, informing him of the usefulness of the treasure.

"One of the fragments of the space source, which can replace the Heavenly Dao text of the Void and assist in the cultivation of the Great Divine Power of the Space!"

Ye Tian was short of breath, this thing can assist in cultivating the great divine power of the space.

He himself possessed an Empty Heavenly Dao script, and now with the addition of the Space Source Fragments, he might be able to practice the Spatial Great Divine Power.

"My Hell Divine Sky Spear, I originally wanted to rely on countless years to comprehend, but in this way, the speed is too slow, now I have a spatial source fragment, plus an Empty Heavenly Dao text, if I can practice the Hell Divine Sky Spear, my strength is enough to skyrocket!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited to put away the fragments of the spatial source, keep them well, and after preparing to leave the Yuangu Palace, he would refine them and comprehend the Spear of the Hell Divine Sky together with the Void Heavenly Dao Text!

"Machine Spirit, I'm going to participate in the fourth round of assessment!"

Ye Tian said.

"Yes!"

The machine spirit mobilized the power of the Yuan Gu Hall and instantly moved Ye Tian to the fourth round of assessment area.

......

In the vast mountains, countless beast roars came.

At the same time, the aura of many strong men also permeated this mountain range, and even some sounds of battle could be heard, coming from far away.

Ye Tian came to such a place, and he was a little puzzled.

The voice of the machine spirit descended: "Survive, the longer you survive, the richer the reward!"

"Survive!"

Ye Tian was slightly startled.

He didn't know the content of this level, and the Terrans didn't find out.

But when I think that the fourth round of assessment is just surviving, this is not easy.

And the longer you survive, the richer the reward, which means that everyone will die, then this death is not really dead, otherwise it would not be said that the longer you survive, the richer the reward.

Otherwise, if you really die, how can you claim the reward?

"It should be when he is about to die, he will be removed by the Yuangu Palace, and even this place may not be the real world!" Ye Tian guessed.

The fourth round is not necessarily about strength, but luck.

If you are weak, if you are lucky enough to survive to the end, you will be able to get a rich reward. Otherwise, even if the strength is strong, if you stop eating soon, there will be no good rewards.

At the first time, Ye Tian restrained his aura, and even used many secret treasures to completely hide his aura, and disguised himself as an ordinary creature, hiding in this mountain range.

But Ye Tian also knows very well that this is not necessarily a good way, if the danger can be avoided by hiding, then this round of assessment will be too simple.

But he didn't know the world, so he had to do it first.
